primary.name: Signal Orange
primary.usage: Primary action buttons, active states, hover glows, text highlights.

base.name: Deep Black
base.usage: Text color for headings, dark backgrounds for inverted sections, heavy borders.

spacing_and_layout.philosophy: Swiss-brutalist: Generous whitespace, asymmetric balance, heavy borders, sharp edges (no rounding).

hero.layout: Asymmetrical split or Bento. Massive typography on the left, visual collage/parallax on the right.
hero.cta: Large, bold button. bg-[#ff5f1f] text-white, no border-radius. On hover: -translate-y-1 shadow-[4px_4px_0px_#0a0a0a].
hero.text: Keep heading heavy. Overline 'FAST, RELIABLE DOORSTEP REPAIR'. Add a trust badge nearby (e.g. 'Rated 4.7/5').

category_grid.layout: Grid: 2 cols on mobile, 3 tablet, 4 desktop.
category_grid.card_style: Sharp edges, 1px or 2px solid border-[#0a0a0a], bg-white. Padded nicely (p-6).
category_grid.hover_state: -translate-y-1, shadow-[4px_4px_0px_#ff5f1f] or solid black shadow. Icon scales up by 110%.
category_grid.icons: Use Lucide React icons. Map: AC -> Snowflake, Washing Machine -> WashingMachine, Refrigerator -> Refrigerator, Microwave -> Microwave, TV -> Tv, Geyser -> Droplet, Water Purifier -> Filter, Kitchen Chimney -> Utensils, Fan -> Fan.

trust_band.style: bg-[#0a0a0a] text-white py-4 font-mono text-sm uppercase tracking-wider. Items separated by star/dot.

how_it_works.style: Step numbers in massive overlapping font (opacity-10 text-black). Clean descriptive text.

navigation.desktop: Sticky header, glass-morphism effect (backdrop-blur-md bg-white/80) on scroll. Solid bottom border border-[#0a0a0a]. Animated underlines on hover for links.
navigation.mobile: Hamburger menu opening a sheet. Fixed CTA at the bottom of the screen ('Book Now').

animations.hero_stagger: Stagger children (0.1s delay) sliding up from y: 20, opacity: 0 to y: 0, opacity: 1.
animations.parallax: Use useScroll and useTransform for subtle y-axis shifting of hero images on scroll.
animations.scroll_reveals: whileInView={ opacity: 1, y: 0 }, initial={ opacity: 0, y: 30 }, viewport={ once: true, margin: '-100px' }.
animations.micro_interactions: whileHover={{ scale: 1.05 }} for icons inside category cards.
animations.ticker: Use framer-motion animate x: [0, -100%] with repeat: Infinity for the trust pills marquee.

mobile_first.touch_targets: Minimum 44px height for all buttons and links.
mobile_first.typography_scaling: Ensure text-7xl drops to text-5xl on mobile to prevent overflow.
mobile_first.fixed_elements: Bottom sticky primary CTA bar strictly for mobile view to drive conversions.

instructions_to_main_agent: 1. Ensure 'framer-motion' is installed via yarn. Install 'lucide-react' if not already available.

3. Map existing emoji categories to explicit Lucide icons: AC -> Snowflake, Washing Machine -> WashingMachine, Refrigerator -> Refrigerator, Microwave -> Microwave, TV -> Tv, Geyser -> Droplet, Water Purifier -> Filter, Kitchen Chimney -> Utensils, Fan -> Fan.
4. Apply Swiss-Brutalist UI: No rounded corners (`rounded-none`), heavy thick borders (`border-2 border-[#0a0a0a]`), deep solid shadows (`shadow-[4px_4px_0px_#ff5f1f]`), and stark contrasts.
5. Avoid generic purple or teal gradients. Use only Signal Orange (`--gr-orange` / `#ff5f1f`), Black (`#0a0a0a`), and White.
6. Integrate a sticky mobile-only bottom nav containing the primary 'Book a service' CTA.

7. Include all required 'data-testid' tags per the user's constraints: 'cat-{sku}', 'hero-book-cta', 'hero-call-cta', 'nav-services', 'nav-login', 'nav-register', 'nav-mybookings', 'nav-console', 'customer-landing'.
8. Implement scroll-triggered framer-motion animations: staggered text reveals, a continuous marquee for trust indicators, and parallax background elements.
9. Use the `Cabinet Grotesk` (font-display) heavily for headings in combination with tight letter-spacing (`tracking-tight`).
10. For trust metrics (12,000+, 450+, 4.7), build an animated number counter component triggered when scrolled into view.
